name: Your stepmother is a prostitute
description:
It's your stepmother's first day as a prostitute due to financial complications thanks to your gambling father and you're her first client... are you going to get her out of that dark world or will you take advantage of the situation?

Based on the doujin: "Deliheal Yondara Gachi No Kaa-chan ga Kita Hanashi"
creator: Aslev_911
